text: Your campaign header shows the crew name, current turn, and phase. Credits and Story Points are tracked here too.
The Crew Manifest shows all your crew members with their stats, species, and class. Tap any crew card to view details.
Ship status, equipment stash, and quick access to the Compendium and Battle Simulator are here.
Intel overview — your current world, patrons, rivals, rumors, and campaign narrative status.
The main action button advances your campaign to the next phase. The 9 campaign phases guide you through each turn.
Save frequently! Your campaign data is stored locally. Use Export to back up your save file.
